items.title: NFL owners OK two significant replay changes
items.summary: NFL owners approved a contingency plan Tuesday to centralize officiating in the event of a work stoppage as negotiations continue on a CBA with the NFL Referees Association.

items.title: Jags OK'd to play '27 home games in Orlando
items.summary: The Jaguars' proposal to play their home games in the 2027 season in Orlando, Florida, during the final year of the $1.4 billion renovation of EverBank Stadium was unanimously approved by the NFL's owners Tuesday.
